results.rendered_html:
himavat a. Snowy, icy, frosty.
— m. The Himālaya mountain;  R. 4. 79 ,  V. 5. 22. 
Comp.
— kukṣiḥ a valley of the Himālaya.
— puraṃ N. of Oṣadhiprastha, the capital of Himālaya;  Ku. 6. 33. 
— sutaḥ the Maināka mountain.
— sutā
1 Pārvatī.
2 the Ganges.
